name: tool_use_sandbox
description: an agent world choosing tools to satisfy a request; actions call_tool, observe, finish

card.description: an agent world choosing tools to satisfy a request; actions call_tool, observe, finish

rules: 'call_tool' with params.tool runs that tool if it is in available_tools and the agent has not finished; it records the call and leaves one result pending observation.
'observe' consumes one pending tool result, turning it into an observation.
'finish' ends the episode; the request is satisfied only if every required tool has been called and no tool result is left unobserved.
Once finished, the state is terminal and no further action changes it.
